channel.title: ProbBrain - AI News Terminal
channel.description: AI lab announcements, arXiv papers, GitHub and HuggingFace trending, AI Hacker News, and independent writers - aggregated, deduped, and posted to @ProbBrain on Telegram.

item.title: [Simon Willison] Microsoft's new MAI models
item.description: Microsoft's new MAI models

item.title: [Simon Willison] datasette-agent-micropython 0.1a0
item.description: datasette-agent-micropython 0.1a0

item.title: [Hacker News] Gmail thinks I'm stupid, so I left
item.description: Gmail thinks I'm stupid, so I left

item.title: [Hacker News] MAI-Code-1-Flash
item.description: MAI-Code-1-Flash

item.title: [Hacker News] MAI-Thinking-1
item.description: MAI-Thinking-1

item.title: [Hacker News] Three Ways to Get Paid (2018)
item.description: Three Ways to Get Paid (2018)

item.title: [Latent Space] GitHub's plan for Agents — Kyle Daigle, GitHub
item.description: GitHub's plan for Agents — Kyle Daigle, GitHub

item.title: [Hacker News] Trump signs downsized AI order after weeks of reversals
item.description: Trump signs downsized AI order after weeks of reversals

item.title: [Interconnects] Farewell Ai2
item.description: Farewell Ai2

item.title: [Anthropic] Expanding Project Glasswing
item.description: Expanding Project Glasswing

item.title: [GitHub Trending] sponsors/affaan-m — The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
item.description: Agent harness system adds performance optimization, memory, and security features for Claude Code and other code editors.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] sponsors/chopratejas — Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server.
item.description: Compresses tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks by 60-95% before LLM processing while producing identical answers.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] jamwithai/production-agentic-rag-course
item.description: GitHub trending repository offering educational material on developing production agentic retrieval-augmented generation systems.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] Open-LLM-VTuber/Open-LLM-VTuber — Talk to any LLM with hands-free voice interaction, voice interruption, and Live2D taking face running locally across platforms
item.description: Open-LLM-VTuber enables hands-free voice interaction with LLMs, featuring Live2D avatars, voice interruption, and local cross-platform deployment.

item.title: [OpenAI] Travelers deploys AI-powered claims countrywide with OpenAI
item.description: Travelers deploys AI-powered claims countrywide with OpenAI

item.title: [Hacker News] Adafruit Receives Demand Letter from Fenwick Legal Counsel on Behalf of Flux.ai
item.description: Adafruit Receives Demand Letter from Fenwick Legal Counsel on Behalf of Flux.ai

item.title: [OpenAI] Codex for every role, tool, and workflow
item.description: Codex for every role, tool, and workflow

item.title: [Hacker News] Different attitudes towards AI in California's university system
item.description: Different attitudes towards AI in California's university system

item.title: [OpenAI] Advancing youth safety and opportunity through global leadership
item.description: Advancing youth safety and opportunity through global leadership

item.title: [Hacker News] Strace-ui, Bonsai_term, and the TUI renaissance
item.description: Strace-ui, Bonsai_term, and the TUI renaissance

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] BitsMoE: Efficient Spectral Energy-Guided Bit Allocation for MoE LLM Quantization
item.description: BitsMoE uses spectral-energy-guided bit allocation to improve MoE LLM quantization in ultra-low-bit regimes.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] DAStatFormer: A Hybrid Multibranch Transformer with Statistical Feature Integration for DAS-Based Pattern Recognitions
item.description: DAStatFormer hybrid Transformer extracts multi-domain statistical features from distributed acoustic sensing data for event classification, achieving 99.4% accuracy with reduced computational cost.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Hoeffding Concept Bottleneck Models with Applications to Overhead Images
item.description: Hoeffding Concept Bottleneck Models use gradient-boosted tree decomposition for non-linear concept aggregation, improving explainability and accuracy over linear bottleneck approaches.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] From Demonstrations to Rewards: Test-Time Prompt Optimization for VLM Reward Models
item.description: Demo2Reward optimizes VLM-based reward model prompts using few demonstrations to improve robotic policy learning without additional training.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A Shared Valence Axis Across Modern LLMs and Human EEG: The Saturation Regularity
item.description: LLMs and human EEG share a common emotional valence structure, but explicit alignment methods don't improve brain activity decoding.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Automatically Differentiable Nonlinear Tensor Networks (ADNTNs) for Exponential Compression of Deep Neural Networks
item.description: Automatically Differentiable Nonlinear Tensor Networks compress neural networks 2,000x to 77,000x while maintaining or improving accuracy through structured weight generation.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Foundation-Preserving Adaptation via Generalized Rayleigh-Quotient Optimization
item.description: FoLoRA optimizes fine-tuning of foundation models by balancing downstream task performance against degradation of non-target capabilities using spectral methods.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] World Models: A Comprehensive Survey of Architectures, Methodologies, Reasoning Paradigms, and Applications
item.description: arXiv survey proposes unified taxonomy for world models across four dimensions: architecture, methodology, reasoning strategies, and applications.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] On Effectiveness and Efficiency of Agentic Tool-calling and RL Training
item.description: Research shows LLM tool-calling evaluation is sensitive to implementation choices and introduces techniques to accelerate RL training efficiency.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Generative AI and Digital Ecosystem Resilience: A Proactive Lifecycle-Based Survey
item.description: Survey proposes proactive detection methods for GenAI-generated inauthentic narratives using lifecycle-based analysis.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Geometric Erasure by Contrastive Velocity Matching in Rectified Flows
item.description: GEM enables concept erasure in Rectified Flow models through geometric guidance, suppressing harmful concepts while preserving benign generation.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Adaptive data selection improves wearable prediction under low baseline performance
item.description: Adaptive data selection strategies improve wearable health prediction, with greater benefits for participants with low baseline performance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] BudgetDraft: Acceptance-Aware Multi-View Training for Sparse-KV Speculative Decoding
item.description: BudgetDraft trains sparse-KV drafters with multiple sampled budgets to improve speculative decoding acceptance rates and achieve 2-6.5x speedups for mid-to-long context inference.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] RAFT: Data Refinement and Adaptive Distillation for Domain Fine-Tuning with Alleviated Forgetting
item.description: RAFT mitigates catastrophic forgetting in domain fine-tuning through data refinement and on-policy distillation, improving domain accuracy 23.2% while maintaining general capabilities.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Emergence of Exploration in Policy Gradient Reinforcement Learning via Retrying
item.description: Researchers introduce ReMax, an RL objective that naturally induces exploration without explicit bonuses by evaluating expected maximum return over multiple samples.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] ChurnNet: A Optimized Modern AI for Churn Prediction
item.description: Traditional machine learning methods outperform modern unified time series models for churn prediction on accuracy, efficiency, and computational requirements.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Beyond Augmentation: Score-Guided Pathological Prior for EEG-based Depression Detection
item.description: EEG-based depression detection using anomaly scoring without data augmentation for small-sample learning scenarios.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Agentic Transformers Provably Learn to Search via Reinforcement Learning
item.description: Transformers provably learn tree search via reinforcement learning, mechanistically implementing depth-first search with backtracking.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] AI-Guided Design and Optimization of Graphite-Based Anodes via Iterative Experimental Feedback
item.description: AI-guided iterative workflow for graphite battery anodes achieves 100% production success and increases high-capacity cell performance to 84.8%.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Learning to Construct Practical Agentic Systems
item.description: Researchers present modular framework using pseudo-tools and fixed workflows for practical LLM-based agents, optimizing cost and accuracy through learning methods.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] BAGEN: Are LLM Agents Budget-Aware?
item.description: LLM agents lack budget-awareness and over-optimistically continue spending on failing tasks; early stopping with training reduces token costs by 28-64%.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] From Rashomon Theory to PRAXIS: Efficient Decision Tree Rashomon Sets
item.description: PRAXIS algorithm efficiently approximates Rashomon sets of near-optimal decision tree models with orders of magnitude runtime and memory improvements.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Quantized Reasoning Models Think They Need to Think Longer, but They Do Not
item.description: Quantized reasoning models produce longer reasoning chains due to overthinking marker bias; logit penalties reduce chain length while maintaining accuracy.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] LithoGRPO: Fast Inverse Lithography via GRPO Reinforced Flow Matching
item.description: LithoGRPO combines flow matching and reinforcement learning to optimize semiconductor lithography masks, with a 130x faster evaluation algorithm.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A Pre-Training Analogue of Grokking in Language Models: Tracing Delayed Grammatical Generalization
item.description: Researchers identify grokking-like delayed generalization of grammatical concepts in LLM pre-training using BLiMP minimal pairs.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] InfoAtlas: A Foundation Model for Zero-Shot Statistical Dependence Estimate
item.description: InfoAtlas foundation model estimates mutual information between high-dimensional variables in a single forward pass, achieving 100× speedup over iterative neural estimators.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] ARCA: Adapter-Residual Credit Assignment When Token Signals Degenerate
item.description: ARCA addresses degenerate token credit signals in LoRA-fine-tuned LLMs by measuring adapter hidden-state changes instead of output distribution shifts.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] When Softmax Fails at the Top: Extreme Value Corrections for InfoNCE
item.description: WEINCE corrects InfoNCE's softmax assumptions using extreme value theory and endpoint shortfall corrections, improving contrastive learning on vision benchmarks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Inner Product Aware Quantization: Provably Fast, Accurate, and Adaptive Algorithms
item.description: Researchers develop inner product aware quantization algorithms that preserve inner products with unseen vectors, achieving 2-10× speedup over prior methods.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Accurate Large-sample Uncertainty Quantification using Stochastic Gradient Markov Chain Monte Carlo
item.description: Novel discrete-time approximations to stochastic gradient methods provide accurate uncertainty quantification and tuning guidance for large-batch and misspecified settings.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] DraDDP: A Multimodal Multi-Party Dialogue Discourse Parsing Dataset
item.description: First multimodal dataset for multi-party dialogue discourse parsing, DraDDP contains 6,374 utterances from American TV drama with video.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Toward Robust In-Context Learning: Leveraging Out-of-distribution Proxies for Target Inaccessible Demonstration Retrieval
item.description: Researchers propose DOPA, a framework using out-of-distribution proxies to improve demonstration retrieval for LLMs on inaccessible target domains.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] AEyeDE: An Attention-Based Attribution Framework for AI-Generated Text Detection
item.description: Researchers propose AEyeDE, an attention-based method using CNNs to distinguish AI-generated from human-written text.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] CSRP: Chain-of-Thought Reasoning for Chinese Text Correction via Reinforcement Learning with Efficiency-Aware Rewards
item.description: CSRP, an LLM-based framework using reinforcement learning, achieves state-of-the-art Chinese grammatical error correction by penalizing unnecessary edits.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] SENSE: Semantic Embedding Navigation with Soft-gated Evaluation for Retrieval-based Speculative Decoding
item.description: SENSE improves retrieval-based speculative decoding for LLMs by using semantic embeddings instead of lexical matching, achieving 3.26x speedup.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] lmfaoooo at SemEval-2026 Task 1: Humor Is an Audience. Preference Modeling for Constrained Humor Generation
item.description: SemEval-2026 humor generation system uses preference modeling trained on human comparisons to select candidates from diverse pools, ranking 1st in English and Chinese tasks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] TrustLDM: Benchmarking Trustworthiness in Language Diffusion Models
item.description: Researchers introduce TrustLDM benchmark evaluating safety, privacy, and fairness of language diffusion models, revealing trustworthiness vulnerabilities when malicious contexts are present.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] ART: Attention Run-time Termination for Efficient Large Language Model Decoding
item.description: ART method terminates KV cache accesses early during LLM decoding, achieving 20% throughput improvement while maintaining accuracy.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Cognitive-Linguistic Indicators of Depression in Online Communities: Analysed by DistilBERT and Holographic Reduced Representation
item.description: Hybrid model combining DistilBERT embeddings with cognitive-linguistic features achieves 0.94 F1 score for depression detection in online text.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] A Multi-Domain Red Teaming Framework for Safety, Robustness, and Fairness Evaluation of Medical Large Language Models
item.description: Red teaming framework identifies critical safety failures in medical LLMs masked by high average performance.
